## 👉 Feature requests belong in Discussions
 
For feature ideas, please use the **[Discussions → Feature requests](https://github.com/todevelopers/gnome-shell-extension-rss-feed/discussions/categories/feature-requests)** section instead of Issues.
 
Before opening a new discussion, **please search existing ones** — your idea may already be there. If it is, give it a 👍 upvote instead of creating a duplicate. The most upvoted requests are more likely to be prioritized.
 
**[➡️ Search existing Feature requests](https://github.com/todevelopers/gnome-shell-extension-rss-feed/discussions/categories/feature-requests)**
 
**[➡️ Open a new Feature request](https://github.com/todevelopers/gnome-shell-extension-rss-feed/discussions/new?category=feature-requests)**
